name: Wayne Bergeron
abstract: Wayne Bergeron (born January 16, 1958) is an American trumpeter. Bergeron rose to prominence as a member of Maynard Ferguson's band in the 1980s.

interviews.title: Wayne Bergeron interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, December 29, 2020

concerts.label: Caleb Chapman's Crescent Super Band
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: Jerry Hey
about_quotes.evidence: Wayne Bergeron added to the mix... you go in with those kind of guys like that... Wayne Bergeron is kind of the guy now who can play anything. So he plays.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jerry Hey interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, November 2, 2023

about_quotes.speaker: Mike Vax
about_quotes.evidence: [INTERVIEWER] Do you know Wayne Bergeron? [INTERVIEWEE] Oh very well. What a great player, what a great guy, I mean he’s just amazing.
about_quotes.doc_title: Mike Vax interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, December 29, 2022

about_quotes.speaker: Diblasio
about_quotes.evidence: I’m thinking of all my friends that I know, Wayne Bergeron plays lead trumpet out in L.A., he’s on all those “Family Guy” sessions

about_quotes.speaker: Nick Mondello
about_quotes.evidence: in L.A. later on you had Al Porcino and Wayne Bergeron of course, all these great, great, great, tremendous, tremendous players.
about_quotes.doc_title: Nick Mondello interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, October 19, 2022
